vitest-react.manual_manifest_edit: vitest.config.ts MUST include: plugins:[react()], test.environment:'jsdom', test.setupFiles:['./vitest.setup.ts'] dove vitest.setup.ts importa '@testing-library/jest-dom/vitest'. Risolvere resolve.alias allineato a tsconfig paths.
vitest-react.notes: Variant React per stack javascript_frontend con detection_keywords=react. Senza questo bundle T3 components falliscono su render()/screen non risolti.

pytest.command: pip install pytest pytest-cov pytest-asyncio pytest-mock
pytest.alt_poetry: poetry add --group=dev pytest pytest-cov pytest-asyncio pytest-mock

pytest+chispa.command: pip install pytest pytest-cov pytest-asyncio pytest-mock chispa pyspark
pytest+chispa.alt_poetry: poetry add --group=dev pytest pytest-cov pytest-asyncio pytest-mock chispa pyspark
pytest+chispa.notes: Variant per stack 'pyspark'. Include chispa per DataFrame equality. Test code DEVE usare session-scoped SparkSession fixture con master='local[*]' (no real cluster). Per Glue job: aggiungere conftest con sys.modules['awsglue']=MagicMock() PRIMA della collection.

junit5-gradle.manual_manifest_edit:
Aggiungi a build.gradle dependencies:
  testImplementation 'org.junit.jupiter:junit-jupiter:5.10.0'
  testImplementation 'org.mockito:mockito-core:5.5.0'
E in test block: useJUnitPlatform()

go-test-db.command: go get -t github.com/stretchr/testify github.com/DATA-DOG/go-sqlmock github.com/go-redis/redismock/v9 google.golang.org/grpc/test/bufconn
go-test-db.notes: Variant opt-in per microservizi con DB/Redis/gRPC. Include sqlmock (sqlx/database/sql), redismock (go-redis v9), bufconn (in-process gRPC server). Senza, T3/T4 handler bruciano repair iter su mock setup inventato.

flutter_test.manual_manifest_edit:
Aggiungi a pubspec.yaml dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter
  mocktail: ^1.0.0

xunit.command: dotnet add package xunit && dotnet add package xunit.runner.visualstudio && dotnet add package coverlet.collector
